allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8787/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 } catch { "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); "BODY: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8787/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 } catch { "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); "BODY:"; $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell(try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://my-app.shinsenna2023.workers.dev/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "/      STATUS: $\($r1.StatusCode\) LEN: $\($r1.Content.Length\)"; if \($r1.Content -match 'Apex Talent'\) { "/      CONTENT: ok" } } catch { "/      ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://my-app.shinsenna2023.workers.dev/jobs' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "/jobs  STATUS: $\($r2.StatusCode\) LEN: $\($r2.Content.Length\)"; if \($r2.Content -match 'Senior Backend Engineer'\) { "/jobs  CONTENT: ok" } } catch { "/jobs  ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
